title: Error while accessing monday.com API

posts.author: atulgupta (Atul Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear team,

Everything was working perfectly and suddenly I am getting below error while sending data from Salesforce to Monday using custom API.

{“error_code”:“UserUnauthroizedException”,“status_code”:403,“error_message”:“User unauthorized to perform action”,“error_data”:{}}

When I try to login into developer API documentation getting below -

image782×309 9.66 KB

Please suggest.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @atulgupta

Don’t know why you get this error, looks like there is a permission / authorization issue.

As for the documentation: that has been moved to What is a monday app?
